site.name: Toolify
site.tagline: Free Online Tools, Calculators & Converters (No Signup)
site.description: 60+ free online calculators, converters, and generators — WPM test, countdown timer, BMI, unit converter and more. All in your browser, no signup, no install.

home.heading: Free online tools that just work
home.subheading: Hand-built calculators and converters for everyday questions. All your data stays on your device.
home.whyIntro: Every Toolify tool is built around four promises:
home.whyPrivacyTitle: Your data stays on your device
home.whyPrivacyText: Calculations run in your browser. We never see your inputs — no servers, no logging.
home.whyNoSignupText: Open the tool, get the answer. Bookmarkable URLs, mobile-friendly, works offline once loaded.
home.whyAccurateText: Each calculator's math is reviewed against authoritative sources — not pulled from a random API.
home.whyMultilingualText: Every tool is translated with locale-specific examples and terminology — not machine-translated.

tool.financeDisclaimer: This tool provides general information and estimates only — it is not financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Verify important figures with a qualified professional before making decisions.
tool.medicalDisclaimer: This tool is for general information only and is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Consult a qualified healthcare professional about your health.

consent.title: Cookies & ads
consent.body: We use cookies for analytics and to show ads that keep this site free. You can choose to accept all, only essential, or customize.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist.

about.intro: Toolify is a free collection of online utilities that run entirely in your browser. We build small, focused tools for the kinds of everyday questions that don't deserve a full app.
about.p1: Everything runs locally in your browser. We don't send your inputs to a server.
about.p2: Each tool ships with its formula, sources, and caveats so you can trust the result.
about.p3: We rely on Google AdSense to keep the site free — no subscription, no paywall.
about.p4: We track when each tool was last updated and revise it when standards change.
about.methodologyHeading: How we build and check our tools
about.methodology: Every calculator starts from a published formula or standard — the WHO and CDC for health metrics, established financial math for loans and interest, and primary references for unit definitions. We state the formula and its assumptions on each page, run the math entirely in your browser, and note the limits of what a single number can tell you. When a standard is revised, we update the affected tools and refresh their review date.
about.contactCta: Found a mistake or an edge case we missed? Email us at {email} — we read every message and correct errors quickly.
about.lastReviewed: This page was last reviewed in June 2026.
about.operated: Toolify is built and maintained by {name}, an independent developer based in Japan. It is a personal project, not a company — which is exactly why every tool runs in your browser and sends nothing to a server.
about.why: I started Toolify because I was tired of hunting for a simple converter or calculator and landing on pages buried under pop-ups, sign-up walls, and trackers. I wanted fast, single-purpose tools that respect your time and your data, and that work in the language you actually think in. Every tool here is one I needed myself at some point, and I deliberately keep the list small so I can maintain each one properly.
about.operatorLink: You can see more of my work at

contact.intro: Please send feedback, requests, or bug reports to the address below. We aim to reply within three business days.
contact.operated: Toolify is operated by {name}, an independent developer based in Japan.
